title: $1,000 in Microsoft on Satya Nadella's First Day (2014)
description: What $1,000 invested in Microsoft on February 4, 2014 — the day Satya Nadella became CEO — would be worth today with dividends reinvested. Nadella's 'mobile-first, cloud-first' strategy pivoted Microsoft away from declining Windows revenue toward Azure cloud services, transforming a stagnant company.
dividend_note: Microsoft paid and grew its quarterly dividend throughout this period. DRIP meaningfully adds to total return over 11 years.
educational_note: No stock splits in this period — all return is from price appreciation and DRIP. Azure grew from near-zero to ~$110B+ annual run rate under Nadella. Microsoft also became one of the first major investors in OpenAI.
